source: marines.mil, marsoc.marines.mil, mcesg.marines.mil, mcrdpi.marines.mil, MARADMIN FY2026

stages.title: Recruit Training (Boot Camp)
stages.location: MCRD San Diego CA or MCRD Parris Island SC

phases.key: IST, receiving gear, meeting DIs, basic drill
Conditioning, swim qual (3rd class min), first aid, USMC history
Rifle qual (expert target 220+/250), land nav, gas chamber
Crucible (54-hr FTX, minimal food/sleep), EGA ceremony, graduation

stages.note_marriage: Married before shipping: BAH with dependents starts Day 1. San Diego E-1 w/dep BAH: ~$2,934/mo. Does NOT mean family can live at MCRD during training.

stages.title: School of Infantry — Infantry Rifleman Course (IRC)
stages.location: Camp Pendleton CA (west) or Camp Geiger/Lejeune NC (east)
stages.note: HZ Recon contract Marines diverge here directly to RSAT. 0311-contract Marines proceed to fleet.

stages.title: Recon Selection and Aptitude Test (RSAT)
stages.note: Fail: return to 03XX, re-screen in 6-12 months. Can re-screen 1-2 times typically.

stages.title: Ground Reconnaissance Course (GRC)
stages.location: Amphibious Reconnaissance School, Camp Pendleton or Lejeune
stages.content: Small unit Recon tactics, patrol base ops, advanced land nav, comms, patrol reports, photography, combat sketch, rappelling.

stages.title: Amphibious Reconnaissance Course (ARC) / BRC
stages.content: Subsurface recon, open-ocean swimming, advanced patrol, HRST, immediate action drills.

stages.title: Combatant Diver Course (CDC)
stages.location: Navy Diving and Salvage Training Center, Panama City FL
stages.content: Open circuit SCUBA, closed circuit LAR-V Drager, underwater navigation, combat dive ops.
stages.common_DQ: Ear barotrauma, lung squeeze — common medical DQ. Can re-attempt after medical clearance.

stages.title: Basic Airborne Course (BAC)
stages.content: 5 qualifying jumps. US Army jump school. Low attrition. Earns airborne wings.
stages.pay_add: Jump pay: $150/mo while in jump status

stages.title: Military Free Fall (MFF/HALO/HAHO)
stages.location: Fort Liberty NC or Yuma Proving Ground AZ
stages.content: High altitude low/high opening parachute ops. Advanced SOF insertion.

stages.title: SERE Level C
stages.location: Brunswick ME or Fairchild AFB WA
stages.content: Survival, Evasion, Resistance, Escape. Includes realistic captivity resistance training. Classified curriculum. Mandatory for all Recon/SOF Marines.

stages.title: Scout Sniper Basic Course (SSBC)
stages.location: Weapons Training Battalion Quantico VA or 1st/2nd/3rd Marine Division schools
stages.rank_required: E-3 LCpl through E-5 Sgt with 03XX MOS
prerequisites: Medically qualified — heat injury susceptibility screened
24 months remaining in USMC at completion
Volunteer serving in designated sniper billet within operating forces
Pre-course: 10 evaluated stalks + ghillie suit constructed
Pre-course: 12 hrs land nav practical application
Pre-course: 5 hrs range estimation practical application
stages.content: Advanced marksmanship (M40A6, M110 SASS), stalking/ghillie concealment, range estimation, observation and surveillance, 2-man sniper team mission planning, ballistics data books, target acquisition.

stages.title: MARSOC A&S Phase I
stages.swim_requirement: 300m in utility uniform (side or breast stroke) + 11-min water tread in full utilities + 4-min blouse/trouser flotation
stages.content: PERRES program (Performance and Resiliency). Fitness events, nutrition, mental resiliency. CSO mentor exposure. Attendance does NOT guarantee Phase II seat.

stages.title: MARSOC A&S Phase II
stages.content: Full SOF selection. Mentally and physically extreme. Team and individual assessment by experienced CSOs. Passing secures MRC seat.
stages.attrition: 50-70% of Phase II entrants do not receive MRC seats

stages.title: Marine Raider Course (MRC)
stages.location: Marine Raider Training Center (MRTC), Camp Lejeune NC

phases.name: Basic Skills
phases.content: Physical fitness (endurance/functional/amphibious), swimming, hand-to-hand combat, land nav, patrolling, SERE intro, TCCC, fire support, comms.

phases.name: Small Unit Tactics
phases.content: Small boat and scout swimmer ops, crew served weapons, demolitions (C4, Claymore, det cord), photography, information collection, direct action raids, special reconnaissance.

phases.name: Special Operations
phases.content: DA, SR, IW (Irregular Warfare), working by/with/through partner forces, language/culture intro, SOF fire support, SOCOM weapons qualification.

phases.name: Mission Execution
phases.content: Full-mission profiles in realistic environments. FTX culminating exercise. Individual and team assessment throughout.

stages.title: Marine Security Guard (MSG) School
prerequisites: Service Pro/Cons 4.2/4.2 or higher (Cpl and below)
2nd Class PFT within 60 days of school
No visible dental fixtures while speaking or smiling
Tattoos within USMC policy — content screened by MSG team
No NJP within 1 year (1 lifetime NJP may be waiverable)
Not in stress/anger management or marital counseling
Minimum $500 available funds after CO financial worksheet
38 months obligated service at time of reporting
6 months TOS at current unit before applying
24 months TOS at current unit to execute orders to MSG school
stages.tour: 3 posts over 4-year program. 12-24 months per post. Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, Latin America.
stages.housing: Government quarters provided at every post. No rent. COLA at most overseas posts.
stages.financial_note: MSG Marines abroad typically save $600-1500/mo more than equivalent stateside Marines. Free housing + COLA = strong savings.

stages.title: Drill Instructor School
stages.location: MCRD Parris Island SC or MCRD San Diego CA
stages.note: Hat (Campaign Cover) ceremony is one of the most significant moments in a Marine's career. Highly prestigious. Career-enhancing for E-5/E-6 promotion. Intense — limited time for college during active DI duty.

stages.title: 20-Year Military Retirement
stages.healthcare: TRICARE for life. Retiree + family. No premium. Civilian equivalent $20,000+/yr.
stages.gi_bill: Post-9/11 (Ch33) usable 15 years post-separation. Use for BA or master's.
stages.va_loan: 0% down, no PMI, competitive rate. Multi-use. Available after first honorable service period.
stages.second_career: Age at 20yr retirement: typically 38-42. Pension + civilian salary ($60-100k) + VA disability = $90-130k+ total annual income typical.
